_note: Manual current-window transfer overrides. Understat has no 2026-27 data yet, so summer-window moves (and late 2025-26 ones) are invisible without this file. Keys are EXACT Understat spellings, resolved by scripts/apply_transfers.py. Value = new canonical club, or null if the player left this league. Verified by per-league agents requiring two independent sources or an official announcement; rumours excluded.

LIGUE1.Sekou Mara: Strasbourg (Transfermarkt only -- two pages, one source)

_coverage._why: A single _verified_on date claims a completeness no sweep has ever achieved. It said 2026-07-18 on the day Mason Greenwood was published at Marseille four days after he signed for Fenerbahce -- the file was fresh and wrong. Coverage is per-sweep and partial; record it that way so the next reader knows what was NOT checked.

sweeps.note: MISSED Greenwood (14 Jul), Guehi (19 Jan), Adama Traore (28 Jan), Hamed Traore. Treat as unreliable.

sweeps.method: top-6 scorers per club, clubs in the 2026-27 fixture lists only
sweeps.verified_by: agent web search, 2 independent sources or official club announcement
sweeps.not_checked: players outside each club's top 6 by goal rate; clubs not in the current fixture lists; the January window before 2026-01-01

sweeps.clubs: n/a -- player-by-player check of player_picks.json board only
sweeps.method: web search per distinct player on the live player_picks.json board: Harry Kane, Erling Haaland, Kylian Mbappe-Lottin, Deniz Undav, Serhou Guirassy, Thiago (Igor Thiago)
sweeps.verified_by: agent web search, current reporting as of 2026-07-24
sweeps.result: all 6 confirmed still at the club shown; no transfers.json changes required
sweeps.not_checked: no fixtures were in the 45min-3h Best Picks window this run, so full STEP 2-5 team-news research was not triggered

known_gaps: Promoted clubs have no Understat history, so no player markets regardless of roster verification. Not a coverage gap that verification can close.
Squad players below the top 6 by goal rate are unverified. They cannot clear a 40% goalscorer bar, so the exposure is to props display rather than to a published pick.

_verified_on_note: Date of the most recent sweep, NOT proof every override was re-checked. See _coverage for what each sweep actually covered.
